images.alt:
A cinematic portrait of a woman standing outdoors during a vivid sunset. She is shown from behind and turned slightly over her shoulder, revealing a soft profile and a subtle smile. Her dark hair is gathered into a loose, windswept ponytail, with damp strands framing her face and catching the warm backlight. Multiple silver hoop earrings decorate one ear, adding a modern accent to the otherwise minimal styling. She wears a deep red, backless dress with thin shoulder straps that tie across the lower back, exposing her shoulders and upper back. The intense orange and amber sky fills the entire background, creating a glowing silhouette around her figure while leaving much of her face in soft shadow. The warm light highlights the contours of her skin and the texture of her hair, producing a dramatic balance of shadow and illumination. The composition is intimate and uncluttered, emphasizing graceful posture, rich color, and the quiet atmosphere of sunset.
Keywords:
portrait, woman, sunset, golden hour, backless dress, silhouette, hoop earrings, warm light, profile, cinematic
Attribution line:
AI-generated; use is permitted for non-commercial creative projects. MidJourney, FLUX.1-schnell model via Perchance, Artspace.ai, REVE, Echoform™.

images.alt:
A close-up view shows an open hand overflowing with colorful, sugar-coated gummy candies shaped like quirky little monsters. The candies are packed tightly together, filling the palm with bright reds, pinks, yellows, blues, blacks, and whites. Each candy has its own playful expression, including mismatched eyes, tiny fangs, sleepy eyelids, hearts, bat wings, horns, and goofy grins. Granulated sugar sparkles across every surface, giving them a frosted, crystalline texture that catches the soft outdoor light. The shallow depth of field keeps the candies sharply detailed while the sidewalk and brick background blur into warm, neutral tones. Small tattoos are visible along the fingers, framing the handful of whimsical sweets and emphasizing the scale of each bite-sized creature. The overall image balances cute and creepy, transforming odd-looking candy into an irresistibly cheerful collection of edible monsters.
Keywords:
monster candy, gummy candy, sugar coated, colorful, cute creepy, novelty sweets, close-up, hand, whimsical, confectionery
Attribution line
AI-generated; use is permitted for non-commercial creative projects. MidJourney, FLUX.1-schnell model via Perchance, Artspace.ai, REVE, Echoform™.

images.alt:
A painterly portrait fills the frame with the face of a young boy, centered and staring directly toward the viewer. His dark, tousled hair hangs over his forehead in uneven strands, partially shadowing his expression. One eye remains dark and natural, while the other burns with an intense crimson glow that radiates outward through the surrounding skin, creating the impression of supernatural power awakening beneath the surface. Thin streaks of dark red trail downward from the glowing eye, blending into rough brush textures that resemble smeared paint and dried blood without becoming overtly graphic. His pale face is softly modeled against a background of layered gray and white brushstrokes, with faint hints of buildings dissolving into the abstract surroundings. A dark collar and loosely tied necktie suggest formal clothing, contrasting with the chaotic textures surrounding his head. The overall composition emphasizes the unsettling contrast between childhood innocence and ominous supernatural menace through dramatic lighting, expressive painterly strokes, and restrained use of vivid crimson accents.
Keywords:
child, prophecy, glowing eye, horror, portrait, painterly, supernatural, ominous, dark, red accents, cinematic, gothic
Attribution line
AI-generated; use is permitted for non-commercial creative projects. MidJourney, FLUX.1-schnell model via Perchance, Artspace.ai, REVE, Echoform™.

📯
Bat Above Plum Blossoms

Out here in the dark, the blossoms don't care, the moon isn't watching, and the bat has somewhere to be that isn't here.

#AIイラスト #AiArt #SynthArt #Midjourney8.1

images.alt: A bat with wide teal-toned wings flies before a large golden moon above flowering plum branches laden with cream blossoms and red berries, set against a deep teal background with a fine gold geometric lattice pattern.

record.text:
📯
Two Houses in the Rain

Nights like this, the river decides it wants a closer look at the neighbors, and the neighbors pretend not to notice the figure who has been standing at that door for just a little too long.

#AIイラスト #AiArt #SynthArt #Midjourney8.1

images.alt: Two old cottages, one blue and one amber-yellow, sit at the flooded edge of a dark river at night. Rain streaks the air. Warm light glows in arched windows. A small black-cloaked figure with a pale beak stands at the right-hand door beneath a wall lantern.

Two old cottages, one blue and one amber-yellow, sit at the flooded edge of a dark river at night. Rain streaks the air. Warm light glows in arched windows. A small black-cloaked figure with a pale beak stands at the right-hand door beneath a wall lantern.
